=Considere um contexto de conversa comercial.
Descreva resumidamente o que se parecer ou representa a imagem, apenas diga o que contém, não suponha nada.

Exemplo: Foto de uma tela de transfrência bancária no valor de R$ 100,00. O print não é um comprovante. É um print do preenchimento da transação, com dados borrados.

Legenda da imagem de quem enviou a mensagem (Complementar ao contexto):
{{ $('base64Img').item.json.caption }}

WITH telefone_limpo AS (
  SELECT 
    regexp_replace(
      COALESCE(
        NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', ''),
        '0'  -- fallback impossível, só pra não dar erro
      ),
      '[^0-9]',
      '',
      'g'
    ) as phone_clean,
    -- Variação sem 9 (para DDD >= 28)
    CASE
      WHEN length(regexp_replace(
        NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', ''),
        '[^0-9]', '', 'g'
      )) = 13  -- 55 + DDD(2) + 9(1) + número(8)
      AND substring(regexp_replace(
        NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', ''),
        '[^0-9]', '', 'g'
      ), 5, 1) = '9'
      THEN 
        substring(regexp_replace(
          NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', ''),
          '[^0-9]', '', 'g'
        ), 1, 4) ||
        substring(regexp_replace(
          NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', ''),
          '[^0-9]', '', 'g'
        ), 6)
      ELSE NULL
    END as phone_sem_9,
    -- Variação com 9 (caso o banco tenha sem)
    CASE
      WHEN length(regexp_replace(
        NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', ''),
        '[^0-9]', '', 'g'
      )) = 12  -- 55 + DDD(2) + número(8) SEM 9
      AND substring(regexp_replace(
        NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', ''),
        '[^0-9]', '', 'g'
      ), 3, 2)::int >= 28
      THEN 
        substring(regexp_replace(
          NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', ''),
          '[^0-9]', '', 'g'
        ), 1, 4) || '9' ||
        substring(regexp_replace(
          NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', ''),
          '[^0-9]', '', 'g'
        ), 5)
      ELSE NULL
    END as phone_com_9
),
lead_existente AS (
  SELECT 
    *,
    (chatwoot_contact_id IS NOT NULL) as cadastrado
  FROM leads
  WHERE 
    -- 1. BUSCA EXATA por identificadores WhatsApp (prioridade máxima)
    whatsapp_jid = NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.jid }}', '')
    OR whatsapp_lid = NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.lid }}', '')
    OR whatsapp_identificador_ativo = '{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.identificador_ativo }}'
    
    -- 2. BUSCA FLEXÍVEL por telefone (tenta múltiplas variações)
    OR (
      phone_number IS NOT NULL 
      AND (
        -- Exato
        regexp_replace(phone_number, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = (SELECT phone_clean FROM telefone_limpo)
        -- OU sem 9 (ex: 5534999887766 encontra 553499887766)
        OR regexp_replace(phone_number, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = (SELECT phone_sem_9 FROM telefone_limpo WHERE phone_sem_9 IS NOT NULL)
        -- OU com 9 (ex: 553499887766 encontra 5534999887766)
        OR regexp_replace(phone_number, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = (SELECT phone_com_9 FROM telefone_limpo WHERE phone_com_9 IS NOT NULL)
      )
    )
  LIMIT 1
),
lead_atualizado AS (
  UPDATE leads
  SET
    -- ATUALIZA identificadores WhatsApp (sempre seguro)
    whatsapp_jid = COALESCE(
      NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.jid }}', ''), 
      whatsapp_jid
    ),
    whatsapp_lid = COALESCE(
      NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.lid }}', ''), 
      whatsapp_lid
    ),
    whatsapp_identificador_ativo = '{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.identificador_ativo }}',
    
    -- ATUALIZA phone_number SOMENTE se:
    -- 1. Estava NULL (não tinha)
    -- 2. E agora veio validado do WhatsApp
    phone_number = CASE
      WHEN phone_number IS NULL 
        AND NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', '') IS NOT NULL
      THEN '{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}'
      ELSE phone_number  -- ← MANTÉM o que tinha (conservador)
    END,
    
    -- Atualiza nome se estava vazio
    full_name = COALESCE(
      NULLIF(full_name, ''),
      '{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.nome_contato }}'
    ),
    
    updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM lead_existente)
  RETURNING 
    *,
    (chatwoot_contact_id IS NOT NULL) as cadastrado
),
lead_criado AS (
  INSERT INTO leads (
    phone_number,
    full_name,
    source,
    status,
    lead_score,
    atendimento_tipo,
    whatsapp_phone,
    whatsapp_jid,
    whatsapp_lid,
    whatsapp_identificador_ativo
  )
  SELECT 
    -- Só insere telefone se veio validado
    NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', ''),
    '{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.nome_contato }}',
    'whatsapp_direto',
    'NOVO',
    0,
    'ia',
    NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', ''),
    NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.jid }}', ''),
    NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.lid }}', ''),
    '{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.identificador_ativo }}'
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM lead_existente)
  RETURNING 
    *,
    false as cadastrado
)
SELECT * FROM lead_atualizado
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM lead_existente WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM lead_atualizado)
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM lead_criado
LIMIT 1;

WITH telefone_limpo AS (
  SELECT 
    regexp_replace(
      COALESCE(
        NULLIF('$1', ''),
        '0'
      ),
      '[^0-9]',
      '',
      'g'
    ) AS phone_clean
),
lead_resolvido AS (
  SELECT
    id,
    atendimento_tipo
  FROM leads
  WHERE
    -- prioridade máxima
    whatsapp_identificador_ativo = '{{ $json._whatsapp.identificador_ativo }}'
    OR whatsapp_jid = NULLIF('{{ $json._whatsapp.jid }}', '')
    OR whatsapp_lid = NULLIF('{{ $json._whatsapp.lid }}', '')

    -- fallback por telefone normalizado
    OR (
      phone_number IS NOT NULL
      AND regexp_replace(phone_number, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') =
          (SELECT phone_clean FROM telefone_limpo)
    )
  LIMIT 1
)

SELECT
  id,
  COALESCE(atendimento_tipo, 'ia') AS atendimento_tipo,

  CASE
    WHEN id IS NULL THEN false
    WHEN atendimento_tipo = 'ia' THEN false
    ELSE true
  END AS descartar,

  CASE
    WHEN id IS NULL THEN 'novo_lead'
    ELSE atendimento_tipo
  END AS tipo_atual
FROM lead_resolvido
RIGHT JOIN (SELECT 1) dummy ON true;

-- Verifica limites por canal: 10 minutos e mensal
SELECT 
  -- Contador últimos 10 minutos (neste número específico)
  COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes'
  ) as msgs_10min,
  
  -- Contador último mês (neste número específico)
  COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  ) as msgs_mes,
  
  -- Qual número está sendo verificado
  '{{ $('Resolve Lid e Jid').item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}' as whatsapp_number_verificado,
  
  -- Decisão: bloquear ou não
  CASE 
    WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes') >= 12 
      THEN 'BLOQUEADO_10MIN'
    WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') >= 25 
      THEN 'BLOQUEADO_MES'
    ELSE 'OK'
  END as status_limite,
  
  -- Flag simples
  (
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes') >= 14
    OR 
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') >= 50
  ) as deve_bloquear

FROM interacoes
WHERE lead_id = '{{ $('SELECT | UPSERT Lead').item.json.id }}'
  AND direction = 'OUTBOUND'
  AND ai_generated = true
  AND whatsapp_number = '{{ $('Resolve Lid e Jid').item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}';

-- Verifica limites por canal: 10 minutos e mensal
SELECT 
  -- Contador últimos 10 minutos (neste número específico)
  COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'
  ) as msgs_10min,
  
  -- Contador último mês (neste número específico)
  COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  ) as msgs_mes,
  
  -- Qual número está sendo verificado
  '{{ $('Resolve Lid e Jid').item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}' as whatsapp_number_verificado,
  
  -- Decisão: bloquear ou não
  CASE 
    WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes') >= 10 
      THEN 'BLOQUEADO_10MIN'
    WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') >= 25 
      THEN 'BLOQUEADO_MES'
    ELSE 'OK'
  END as status_limite,
  
  -- Flag simples
  (
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes') >= 14
    OR 
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') >= 50
  ) as deve_bloquear

FROM interacoes
WHERE lead_id = '{{ $('Verifico Tipo Atendimento').item.json.id }}'
  AND direction = 'OUTBOUND'
  AND ai_generated = true
  AND whatsapp_number = '{{ $('Resolve Lid e Jid').item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}';

WITH novo_registro AS (
  INSERT INTO interacoes (
    lead_id, type, direction, message, ai_generated, whatsapp_number, channel_data
  )
  VALUES (
    $1::uuid,
    'WHATSAPP_RECEBIDO',
    'INBOUND',
    CASE $2
      WHEN 'audio'    THEN '[Áudio recebido]'
      WHEN 'video'    THEN '[Vídeo recebido]'
      WHEN 'image'    THEN '[Imagem recebida]'
      WHEN 'document' THEN '[Documento recebido]'
      ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.mensagem_recebida }}', ''), '[Mensagem sem texto]')
    END,
    false,
    $3,
    jsonb_build_object('tipo_mensagem', $2, 'jid', $4, 'lid', $5)
  )
  RETURNING id, lead_id, created_at
),
ultima_outbound AS (
  SELECT created_at AS outbound_time
  FROM interacoes
  WHERE lead_id = (SELECT lead_id FROM novo_registro)
    AND direction = 'OUTBOUND'
    AND created_at < (SELECT created_at FROM novo_registro)
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  (SELECT lead_id FROM novo_registro) AS lead_id,
  COALESCE(
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
      (SELECT created_at FROM novo_registro) -
      (SELECT outbound_time FROM ultima_outbound)
    )),
    0
  ) AS tempo_resposta_lead_segundos;

WITH novo_registro AS (
  INSERT INTO interacoes (
    lead_id, 
    type, 
    direction, 
    message, 
    ai_generated,
    whatsapp_number
  )
  VALUES (
    '{{ $('SELECT | UPSERT Lead').item.json.id }}', 
    'WHATSAPP_RECEBIDO',
    'INBOUND', 
    '{{ $('finalText B').item.json.text }}', 
    false,
    '{{ $('Resolve Lid e Jid').item.json.userJID.split(':')[0] }}'
  )
  RETURNING id, lead_id, created_at
),
ultima_outbound AS (
  SELECT created_at as outbound_time
  FROM interacoes
  WHERE lead_id = (SELECT lead_id FROM novo_registro)
    AND direction = 'OUTBOUND'
    AND created_at < (SELECT created_at FROM novo_registro)
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT lead_id FROM novo_registro) as lead_id,
  COALESCE(
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
      (SELECT created_at FROM novo_registro) - 
      (SELECT outbound_time FROM ultima_outbound)
    )),
    0
  ) as tempo_resposta_lead_segundos;

WITH telefone_limpo AS (
  SELECT 
    regexp_replace(
      COALESCE(NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'), '0'),
      '[^0-9]', '', 'g'
    ) AS phone_clean,
    CASE
      WHEN length(regexp_replace(NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'), '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) = 13
       AND substring(regexp_replace(NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 5, 1) = '9'
      THEN 
        substring(regexp_replace(NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 1, 4) ||
        substring(regexp_replace(NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 6)
      ELSE NULL
    END AS phone_sem_9,
    CASE
      WHEN length(regexp_replace(NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'), '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) = 12
       AND substring(regexp_replace(NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 3, 2)::int >= 28
      THEN 
        substring(regexp_replace(NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 1, 4) || '9' ||
        substring(regexp_replace(NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 5)
      ELSE NULL
    END AS phone_com_9
),
lead_existente AS (
  SELECT 
    *,
    (chatwoot_contact_id IS NOT NULL) AS cadastrado
  FROM leads
  WHERE 
    whatsapp_jid = NULLIF(NULLIF($2, ''), 'null')
    OR whatsapp_lid = NULLIF(NULLIF($3, ''), 'null')
    OR whatsapp_identificador_ativo = NULLIF(NULLIF($4, ''), 'null')
    OR (
      phone_number IS NOT NULL AND (
        regexp_replace(phone_number, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = (SELECT phone_clean FROM telefone_limpo)
        OR regexp_replace(phone_number, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = (SELECT phone_sem_9 FROM telefone_limpo WHERE phone_sem_9 IS NOT NULL)
        OR regexp_replace(phone_number, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = (SELECT phone_com_9 FROM telefone_limpo WHERE phone_com_9 IS NOT NULL)
      )
    )
  LIMIT 1
),
lead_atualizado AS (
  UPDATE leads
  SET
    -- Conservador: só atualiza se estava NULL
    whatsapp_jid = CASE WHEN leads.whatsapp_jid IS NULL THEN NULLIF(NULLIF($2, ''), 'null') ELSE leads.whatsapp_jid END,
    whatsapp_lid = CASE WHEN leads.whatsapp_lid IS NULL THEN NULLIF(NULLIF($3, ''), 'null') ELSE leads.whatsapp_lid END,
    whatsapp_identificador_ativo = CASE WHEN leads.whatsapp_identificador_ativo IS NULL THEN NULLIF(NULLIF($4, ''), 'null') ELSE leads.whatsapp_identificador_ativo END,
    
    -- Telefone: só atualiza se estava NULL
    phone_number = CASE WHEN leads.phone_number IS NULL AND NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null') IS NOT NULL THEN NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null') ELSE leads.phone_number END,
    
    -- Nome: só atualiza se estava vazio
    full_name = COALESCE(NULLIF(leads.full_name, ''), NULLIF(NULLIF($5, ''), 'null')),
    updated_at = NOW()
  FROM lead_existente
  WHERE leads.id = lead_existente.id
  RETURNING 
    leads.*,
    (leads.chatwoot_contact_id IS NOT NULL) AS cadastrado,
    
    -- DEBUG: Verifica se houve alteração real
    CASE 
      WHEN lead_existente.whatsapp_jid IS DISTINCT FROM leads.whatsapp_jid
        OR lead_existente.whatsapp_lid IS DISTINCT FROM leads.whatsapp_lid
        OR lead_existente.whatsapp_identificador_ativo IS DISTINCT FROM leads.whatsapp_identificador_ativo
        OR lead_existente.phone_number IS DISTINCT FROM leads.phone_number
        OR lead_existente.full_name IS DISTINCT FROM leads.full_name
      THEN 'ATUALIZADO'
      ELSE 'EXISTENTE_SEM_MUDANCAS'
    END AS debug_acao,
    
    -- DEBUG: Concatena o nome das colunas alteradas
    NULLIF(concat_ws(', ',
      CASE WHEN lead_existente.whatsapp_jid IS DISTINCT FROM leads.whatsapp_jid THEN 'jid' ELSE NULL END,
      CASE WHEN lead_existente.whatsapp_lid IS DISTINCT FROM leads.whatsapp_lid THEN 'lid' ELSE NULL END,
      CASE WHEN lead_existente.whatsapp_identificador_ativo IS DISTINCT FROM leads.whatsapp_identificador_ativo THEN 'identificador_ativo' ELSE NULL END,
      CASE WHEN lead_existente.phone_number IS DISTINCT FROM leads.phone_number THEN 'telefone' ELSE NULL END,
      CASE WHEN lead_existente.full_name IS DISTINCT FROM leads.full_name THEN 'full_name' ELSE NULL END
    ), '') AS debug_campos_alterados
),
lead_criado AS (
  INSERT INTO leads (
    phone_number,
    full_name,
    source,
    status,
    lead_score,
    atendimento_tipo,
    whatsapp_phone,
    whatsapp_jid,
    whatsapp_lid,
    whatsapp_identificador_ativo
  )
  SELECT 
    NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'),
    NULLIF(NULLIF($5, ''), 'null'),
    'whatsapp_direto',
    'NOVO',
    0,
    'ia',
    NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'),
    NULLIF(NULLIF($2, ''), 'null'),
    NULLIF(NULLIF($3, ''), 'null'),
    NULLIF(NULLIF($4, ''), 'null')
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM lead_existente)
  RETURNING 
    *,
    false AS cadastrado,
    'CRIADO' AS debug_acao,
    'novo_registro' AS debug_campos_alterados
)
SELECT * FROM lead_atualizado
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  *, 
  'EXISTENTE_SEM_MUDANCAS' AS debug_acao, 
  NULL AS debug_campos_alterados 
FROM lead_existente WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM lead_atualizado)
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM lead_criado
LIMIT 1;

WITH lead_resolvido AS (
  SELECT
    id,
    atendimento_tipo
  FROM leads
  WHERE id = $1
  LIMIT 1
)

SELECT
  id,
  COALESCE(atendimento_tipo, 'ia') AS atendimento_tipo,

  CASE
    WHEN id IS NULL THEN false
    WHEN atendimento_tipo = 'ia' THEN false
    ELSE true
  END AS descartar,

  CASE
    WHEN id IS NULL THEN 'novo_lead'
    ELSE atendimento_tipo
  END AS tipo_atual
FROM lead_resolvido
RIGHT JOIN (SELECT 1) dummy ON true;

WITH lead_atualizado AS (
  UPDATE leads
  SET
    atendimento_tipo = 'humano',
    handoff_em       = COALESCE(handoff_em, now()),
    updated_at       = now()
  WHERE
    id = $1::uuid
    AND (atendimento_tipo IS NULL OR atendimento_tipo <> 'humano')
  RETURNING id, atendimento_tipo
),
interacao AS (
  INSERT INTO interacoes (
    lead_id,
    type,
    direction,
    message,
    ai_generated,
    whatsapp_number,
    channel_data
  )
  VALUES (
  $1::uuid,
  'WHATSAPP_ENVIADO',
  'OUTBOUND',
  CASE $2
    WHEN 'audio'    THEN '[Áudio enviado]'
    WHEN 'video'    THEN '[Vídeo enviado]'
    WHEN 'image'    THEN '[Imagem enviada]'
    WHEN 'document' THEN '[Documento enviado]'
    ELSE COALESCE(
  NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.mensagem_recebida }}', ''),
  '[Mensagem sem texto]'
)
  END,
  false,
  $3,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'tipo_mensagem', $2,
    'jid',           $4,
    'lid',           $5
  )
  )
  RETURNING id AS interacao_id, lead_id
)
SELECT
  i.lead_id,
  (SELECT id FROM lead_atualizado) IS NOT NULL AS handoff_aplicado,
  i.interacao_id
FROM interacao i;

),

    whatsapp_jid = NULLIF(NULLIF($2, ''), 'null')
    OR whatsapp_lid = NULLIF(NULLIF($3, ''), 'null')
    OR whatsapp_identificador_ativo = NULLIF(NULLIF($4, ''), 'null')
    OR (
      phone_number IS NOT NULL AND (

        OR regexp_replace(phone_number, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = (SELECT phone_sem_9 FROM telefone_limpo WHERE phone_sem_9 IS NOT NULL)
        OR regexp_replace(phone_number, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = (SELECT phone_com_9 FROM telefone_limpo WHERE phone_com_9 IS NOT NULL)
      )
    )
  LIMIT 1
),
lead_atualizado AS (
  UPDATE leads
  SET
    whatsapp_jid = CASE WHEN leads.whatsapp_jid IS NULL THEN NULLIF(NULLIF($2, ''), 'null') ELSE leads.whatsapp_jid END,
    whatsapp_lid = CASE WHEN leads.whatsapp_lid IS NULL THEN NULLIF(NULLIF($3, ''), 'null') ELSE leads.whatsapp_lid END,
    whatsapp_identificador_ativo = CASE WHEN leads.whatsapp_identificador_ativo IS NULL THEN NULLIF(NULLIF($4, ''), 'null') ELSE leads.whatsapp_identificador_ativo END,
    phone_number = CASE WHEN leads.phone_number IS NULL AND NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null') IS NOT NULL THEN NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null') ELSE leads.phone_number END,
    updated_at = NOW()
  FROM lead_existente
  WHERE leads.id = lead_existente.id
  RETURNING 
    leads.*,
    (leads.chatwoot_contact_id IS NOT NULL) AS cadastrado,
    
    -- DEBUG: Verifica se houve alteração real nos dados
    CASE 
      WHEN lead_existente.whatsapp_jid IS DISTINCT FROM leads.whatsapp_jid
        OR lead_existente.whatsapp_lid IS DISTINCT FROM leads.whatsapp_lid
        OR lead_existente.whatsapp_identificador_ativo IS DISTINCT FROM leads.whatsapp_identificador_ativo
        OR lead_existente.phone_number IS DISTINCT FROM leads.phone_number
      THEN 'ATUALIZADO'
      ELSE 'EXISTENTE_SEM_MUDANCAS'
    END AS debug_acao,
    
    -- DEBUG: Concatena o nome das colunas que foram preenchidas
    NULLIF(concat_ws(', ',
      CASE WHEN lead_existente.whatsapp_jid IS DISTINCT FROM leads.whatsapp_jid THEN 'jid' ELSE NULL END,
      CASE WHEN lead_existente.whatsapp_lid IS DISTINCT FROM leads.whatsapp_lid THEN 'lid' ELSE NULL END,
      CASE WHEN lead_existente.whatsapp_identificador_ativo IS DISTINCT FROM leads.whatsapp_identificador_ativo THEN 'identificador_ativo' ELSE NULL END,
      CASE WHEN lead_existente.phone_number IS DISTINCT FROM leads.phone_number THEN 'telefone' ELSE NULL END
    ), '') AS debug_campos_alterados
),
lead_criado AS (
  INSERT INTO leads (
    phone_number, source, status, lead_score, atendimento_tipo, 
    whatsapp_phone, whatsapp_jid, whatsapp_lid, whatsapp_identificador_ativo
  )
  SELECT 
    NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'), 'whatsapp_direto', 'NOVO', 0, 'ia',
    NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'), NULLIF(NULLIF($2, ''), 'null'), NULLIF(NULLIF($3, ''), 'null'), NULLIF(NULLIF($4, ''), 'null')
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM lead_existente)
  RETURNING 
    *,
    false AS cadastrado,
    'CRIADO' AS debug_acao,
    'novo_registro' AS debug_campos_alterados
)
SELECT * FROM lead_atualizado
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  *, 
  'EXISTENTE_SEM_MUDANCAS' AS debug_acao, 
  NULL AS debug_campos_alterados 
FROM lead_existente WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM lead_atualizado)
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM lead_criado
LIMIT 1;

  lead_id,
  type,
  direction,
  message,
  ai_generated,
  whatsapp_number,
  channel_data
)
VALUES (
  $1::uuid,
  'WHATSAPP_ENVIADO',
  'OUTBOUND',
  CASE $2
    WHEN 'audio'    THEN '[Áudio enviado]'
    WHEN 'video'    THEN '[Vídeo enviado]'
    WHEN 'image'    THEN '[Imagem enviada]'
    WHEN 'document' THEN '[Documento enviado]'
    ELSE COALESCE(
  NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.mensagem_recebida }}', ''),
  '[Mensagem sem texto]'
)
  END,
  true,
  $3,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'tipo_mensagem', $2,
    'jid',           $4,
    'lid',           $5
  )
)
RETURNING id AS interacao_id, lead_id, created_at;

parameters.query:
WITH telefone_limpo AS (
  SELECT 
    regexp_replace(
      COALESCE(
        NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', ''),
        '0'  -- fallback impossível, só pra não dar erro
      ),
      '[^0-9]',
      '',
      'g'
    ) as phone_clean,
    -- Variação sem 9 (para DDD >= 28)
    CASE
      WHEN length(regexp_replace(
        NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', ''),
        '[^0-9]', '', 'g'
      )) = 13  -- 55 + DDD(2) + 9(1) + número(8)
      AND substring(regexp_replace(
        NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', ''),
        '[^0-9]', '', 'g'
      ), 5, 1) = '9'
      THEN 
        substring(regexp_replace(
          NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', ''),
          '[^0-9]', '', 'g'
        ), 1, 4) ||
        substring(regexp_replace(
          NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', ''),
          '[^0-9]', '', 'g'
        ), 6)
      ELSE NULL
    END as phone_sem_9,
    -- Variação com 9 (caso o banco tenha sem)
    CASE
      WHEN length(regexp_replace(
        NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', ''),
        '[^0-9]', '', 'g'
      )) = 12  -- 55 + DDD(2) + número(8) SEM 9
      AND substring(regexp_replace(
        NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', ''),
        '[^0-9]', '', 'g'
      ), 3, 2)::int >= 28
      THEN 
        substring(regexp_replace(
          NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', ''),
          '[^0-9]', '', 'g'
        ), 1, 4) || '9' ||
        substring(regexp_replace(
          NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}', ''),
          '[^0-9]', '', 'g'
        ), 5)
      ELSE NULL
    END as phone_com_9
),
lead_existente AS (
  SELECT 
    *,
    (chatwoot_contact_id IS NOT NULL) as cadastrado
  FROM leads
  WHERE 
    -- 1. BUSCA EXATA por identificadores WhatsApp (prioridade máxima)
    whatsapp_jid = NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.jid }}', '')
    OR whatsapp_lid = NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.lid }}', '')
    OR whatsapp_identificador_ativo = '{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.identificador_ativo }}'
    
    -- 2. BUSCA FLEXÍVEL por telefone (tenta múltiplas variações)
    OR (
      phone_number IS NOT NULL 
      AND (
        -- Exato
        regexp_replace(phone_number, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = (SELECT phone_clean FROM telefone_limpo)
        -- OU sem 9 (ex: 5534999887766 encontra 553499887766)
        OR regexp_replace(phone_number, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = (SELECT phone_sem_9 FROM telefone_limpo WHERE phone_sem_9 IS NOT NULL)
        -- OU com 9 (ex: 553499887766 encontra 5534999887766)
        OR regexp_replace(phone_number, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = (SELECT phone_com_9 FROM telefone_limpo WHERE phone_com_9 IS NOT NULL)
      )
    )

    whatsapp_jid = COALESCE(

    ),
    whatsapp_lid = COALESCE(

    -- ATUALIZA phone_number SOMENTE se:

    phone_number = CASE

      THEN '{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}'

        '0'

      '',
      'g'
    ) AS phone_clean
),
lead_resolvido AS (

-- Verifica limites por canal: 10 minutos e mensal
SELECT 
  -- Contador últimos 10 minutos (neste número específico)
  COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes'
  ) as msgs_10min,
  
  -- Contador último mês (neste número específico)
  COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  ) as msgs_mes,
  
  -- Qual número está sendo verificado
  '{{ $('Resolve Lid e Jid').item.json._whatsapp.telefone }}' as whatsapp_number_verificado,
  
  -- Decisão: bloquear ou não
  CASE 
    WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes') >= 12 
      THEN 'BLOQUEADO_10MIN'
    WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') >= 25 
      THEN 'BLOQUEADO_MES'
    ELSE 'OK'
  END as status_limite,
  
  -- Flag simples
  (
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes') >= 14

WITH novo_registro AS (
  INSERT INTO interacoes (
    lead_id, type, direction, message, ai_generated, whatsapp_number, channel_data
  )
  VALUES (
    $1::uuid,
    'WHATSAPP_RECEBIDO',
    'INBOUND',
    CASE $2
      WHEN 'audio'    THEN '[Áudio recebido]'
      WHEN 'video'    THEN '[Vídeo recebido]'
      WHEN 'image'    THEN '[Imagem recebida]'
      WHEN 'document' THEN '[Documento recebido]'
      ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $("Resolve Lid e Jid").item.json._whatsapp.mensagem_recebida }}', ''), '[Mensagem sem texto]')
    END,
    false,
    $3,
    jsonb_build_object('tipo_mensagem', $2, 'jid', $4, 'lid', $5)
  )
  RETURNING id, lead_id, created_at
),
ultima_outbound AS (
  SELECT created_at AS outbound_time
  FROM interacoes
  WHERE lead_id = (SELECT lead_id FROM novo_registro)
    AND direction = 'OUTBOUND'
    AND created_at < (SELECT created_at FROM novo_registro)
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  (SELECT lead_id FROM novo_registro) AS lead_id,
  COALESCE(
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
      (SELECT created_at FROM novo_registro) -
      (SELECT outbound_time FROM ultima_outbound)
    )),
    0
  ) AS tempo_resposta_lead_segundos;

WITH novo_registro AS (
  INSERT INTO interacoes (
    lead_id, 
    type, 
    direction, 
    message, 
    ai_generated,

  )
  VALUES (
    '{{ $('SELECT | UPSERT Lead').item.json.id }}',

    false,
    '{{ $('Resolve Lid e Jid').item.json.userJID.split(':')[0] }}'
  )
  RETURNING id, lead_id, created_at
),
ultima_outbound AS (
  SELECT created_at as outbound_time
  FROM interacoes
  WHERE lead_id = (SELECT lead_id FROM novo_registro)
    AND direction = 'OUTBOUND'
    AND created_at < (SELECT created_at FROM novo_registro)
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT

  COALESCE(
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
      (SELECT created_at FROM novo_registro) - 
      (SELECT outbound_time FROM ultima_outbound)
    )),

WITH telefone_limpo AS (
  SELECT 
    regexp_replace(
      COALESCE(NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'), '0'),
      '[^0-9]', '', 'g'
    ) AS phone_clean,
    CASE
      WHEN length(regexp_replace(NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'), '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) = 13
       AND substring(regexp_replace(NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 5, 1) = '9'
      THEN 
        substring(regexp_replace(NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 1, 4) ||
        substring(regexp_replace(NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 6)
      ELSE NULL
    END AS phone_sem_9,
    CASE
      WHEN length(regexp_replace(NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'), '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) = 12
       AND substring(regexp_replace(NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 3, 2)::int >= 28
      THEN 
        substring(regexp_replace(NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 1, 4) || '9' ||
        substring(regexp_replace(NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 5)
      ELSE NULL
    END AS phone_com_9
),
lead_existente AS (
  SELECT 
    *,
    (chatwoot_contact_id IS NOT NULL) AS cadastrado
  FROM leads
  WHERE 
    whatsapp_jid = NULLIF(NULLIF($2, ''), 'null')
    OR whatsapp_lid = NULLIF(NULLIF($3, ''), 'null')
    OR whatsapp_identificador_ativo = NULLIF(NULLIF($4, ''), 'null')
    OR (
      phone_number IS NOT NULL AND (
        regexp_replace(phone_number, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = (SELECT phone_clean FROM telefone_limpo)
        OR regexp_replace(phone_number, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = (SELECT phone_sem_9 FROM telefone_limpo WHERE phone_sem_9 IS NOT NULL)
        OR regexp_replace(phone_number, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = (SELECT phone_com_9 FROM telefone_limpo WHERE phone_com_9 IS NOT NULL)
      )
    )
  LIMIT 1
),
lead_atualizado AS (
  UPDATE leads
  SET
    -- Conservador: só atualiza se estava NULL
    whatsapp_jid = CASE WHEN leads.whatsapp_jid IS NULL THEN NULLIF(NULLIF($2, ''), 'null') ELSE leads.whatsapp_jid END,
    whatsapp_lid = CASE WHEN leads.whatsapp_lid IS NULL THEN NULLIF(NULLIF($3, ''), 'null') ELSE leads.whatsapp_lid END,
    whatsapp_identificador_ativo = CASE WHEN leads.whatsapp_identificador_ativo IS NULL THEN NULLIF(NULLIF($4, ''), 'null') ELSE leads.whatsapp_identificador_ativo END,
    
    -- Telefone: só atualiza se estava NULL
    phone_number = CASE WHEN leads.phone_number IS NULL AND NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null') IS NOT NULL THEN NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null') ELSE leads.phone_number END,
    
    -- Nome: só atualiza se estava vazio
    full_name = COALESCE(NULLIF(leads.full_name, ''), NULLIF(NULLIF($5, ''), 'null')),
    updated_at = NOW()
  FROM lead_existente
  WHERE leads.id = lead_existente.id
  RETURNING 
    leads.*,
    (leads.chatwoot_contact_id IS NOT NULL) AS cadastrado,
    
    -- DEBUG: Verifica se houve alteração real
    CASE 
      WHEN lead_existente.whatsapp_jid IS DISTINCT FROM leads.whatsapp_jid
        OR lead_existente.whatsapp_lid IS DISTINCT FROM leads.whatsapp_lid
        OR lead_existente.whatsapp_identificador_ativo IS DISTINCT FROM leads.whatsapp_identificador_ativo
        OR lead_existente.phone_number IS DISTINCT FROM leads.phone_number
        OR lead_existente.full_name IS DISTINCT FROM leads.full_name
      THEN 'ATUALIZADO'
      ELSE 'EXISTENTE_SEM_MUDANCAS'
    END AS debug_acao,
    
    -- DEBUG: Concatena o nome das colunas alteradas
    NULLIF(concat_ws(', ',
      CASE WHEN lead_existente.whatsapp_jid IS DISTINCT FROM leads.whatsapp_jid THEN 'jid' ELSE NULL END,
      CASE WHEN lead_existente.whatsapp_lid IS DISTINCT FROM leads.whatsapp_lid THEN 'lid' ELSE NULL END,
      CASE WHEN lead_existente.whatsapp_identificador_ativo IS DISTINCT FROM leads.whatsapp_identificador_ativo THEN 'identificador_ativo' ELSE NULL END,
      CASE WHEN lead_existente.phone_number IS DISTINCT FROM leads.phone_number THEN 'telefone' ELSE NULL END,
      CASE WHEN lead_existente.full_name IS DISTINCT FROM leads.full_name THEN 'full_name' ELSE NULL END
    ), '') AS debug_campos_alterados
),
lead_criado AS (
  INSERT INTO leads (
    phone_number,
    full_name,
    source,
    status,
    lead_score,
    atendimento_tipo,
    whatsapp_phone,
    whatsapp_jid,
    whatsapp_lid,
    whatsapp_identificador_ativo
  )
  SELECT 
    NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'),
    NULLIF(NULLIF($5, ''), 'null'),
    'whatsapp_direto',
    'NOVO',
    0,
    'ia',
    NULLIF(NULLIF($1, ''), 'null'),
    NULLIF(NULLIF($2, ''), 'null'),
    NULLIF(NULLIF($3, ''), 'null'),
    NULLIF(NULLIF($4, ''), 'null')
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM lead_existente)
  RETURNING 
    *,
    false AS cadastrado,
    'CRIADO' AS debug_acao,
    'novo_registro' AS debug_campos_alterados
)
SELECT * FROM lead_atualizado
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  *, 
  'EXISTENTE_SEM_MUDANCAS' AS debug_acao, 
  NULL AS debug_campos_alterados 
FROM lead_existente WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM lead_atualizado)
UNION ALL
